messages.text: Welcome to the interview! Before we begin with technical questions, could you please introduce yourself? Tell me about your background, your experience, and what interests you about this role.

Well, my name is Augustine and I'm an undergraduate engineer at Rajahmundry School of Engineering and Technology and I'm truly delighted to be part of this interview. And to be honest, I have done internships in full stack engineering and I have been.

A new enthusiastic learner and I also been part of various club activities. I'm also very much interested in coding competitions and I've been an active participant in hackathons. Recently I have done a hackathon which I had collaborated with my friends to solve real world problems and I.
Actually bound that hackathon with my team as well.
Can you walk me through a challenging project you have worked on recently?
